title: Israeli military drops charges against soldiers accused of abusing Palestinian detainee
summary_full: The Israeli military's top lawyer cites "exceptional circumstances" for dropping the case involving a Palestinian man held at Sde Teiman military prison.
summary_public: The Israeli military's top lawyer cites "exceptional circumstances" for dropping the case involving a Palestinian man held at Sde Teiman military prison.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Israeli military drops charges against soldiers accused of abusing Palestinian detainee
